title: Dear Life
author: Alice Munro
subline: A letter to a life, written near the end.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A handwritten letter: ruled lines like a notebook page, with cursive-script text rendered in white hairlines, but a single RED line near the bottom — the moment the writing shakes, the line the author wanted to make stand out. -->
  <!-- Ruled lines (notebook page) -->
  <g stroke="#1a1a1a" stroke-width="1">
    <line x1="160" y1="400" x2="1440" y2="400"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="480" x2="1440" y2="480"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="560" x2="1440" y2="560"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="640" x2="1440" y2="640"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="720" x2="1440" y2="720"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="800" x2="1440" y2="800"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="880" x2="1440" y2="880"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="960" x2="1440" y2="960"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="1040" x2="1440" y2="1040"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="1120" x2="1440" y2="1120"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="1200" x2="1440" y2="1200"/>
  </g>
  <!-- A vertical red margin line on the left -->
  <line x1="200" y1="400" x2="200" y2="1200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
  <!-- 'Handwriting' as flowing hairline strokes, abstracted. Several short horizontal strokes per line, simulating written words. -->
  <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <!-- Line 1: short strokes -->
    <path d="M 240 432 L 320 430 L 380 434 L 460 430 L 540 432"/>
    <path d="M 600 432 L 680 430 L 780 432"/>
    <path d="M 240 512 L 320 514 L 420 510 L 520 514"/>
    <path d="M 580 512 L 680 514 L 780 512 L 880 514"/>
    <path d="M 240 592 L 340 590 L 440 594 L 540 590"/>
    <path d="M 600 594 L 720 592 L 840 594 L 960 590"/>
    <path d="M 240 672 L 360 670 L 460 674 L 580 672"/>
    <path d="M 640 674 L 760 670 L 880 674 L 1000 672"/>
    <path d="M 240 752 L 340 754 L 440 750 L 560 754"/>
    <path d="M 620 752 L 720 754 L 820 752"/>
    <path d="M 240 832 L 360 834 L 480 832 L 600 834"/>
    <path d="M 660 832 L 780 834 L 900 832 L 1020 834"/>
    <path d="M 240 912 L 340 910 L 460 914 L 580 912"/>
    <path d="M 640 914 L 760 910 L 880 914"/>
    <path d="M 240 992 L 360 994 L 480 990 L 600 994"/>
    <path d="M 660 992 L 780 994 L 900 990"/>
    <path d="M 240 1072 L 340 1070 L 440 1074 L 540 1070"/>
    <path d="M 600 1074 L 700 1070 L 800 1074"/>
  </g>
  <!-- The signature line: a flowing red script that becomes the 'Dear Life' dedication — the only chromatic element -->
  <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <path d="M 240 1152 Q 320 1140 380 1150 T 540 1148 Q 620 1152 720 1144 T 900 1148 Q 1000 1150 1100 1144"/>
  </g>
  <text x="240" y="1200" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="400" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em" opacity="0.6">Dear Life —</text>
  <!-- Top label: a date -->
  <text x="1440" y="380" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">DECEMBER 2012</text>
</svg>
rationale: A notebook page with horizontal ruled lines. Above the title, simulated cursive 'handwriting' is rendered as a series of flowing hairline strokes — abstracted words. The last line of writing, the 'Dear Life —' dedication, is RED — the only chromatic element, the line that stops being a list of words and becomes a letter. The 360px mixed-case title 'Dear / Life' sits below the page.
